title: 高松宮記念の後に・アツアツ名勝負！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's breathtakingly powerful stride
and Biko Pegasus's awe-inspiring determination
move all who witness them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is deeply grateful to Biko Pegasus
and thanks her rival for running her heart out and
giving her the race of her life.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back at Tracen Academy, Taiki Shuttle is
watching the Takamatsunomiya Kinen with
sparkling eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have taken a great interest in Hishi
Akebono and vows to train even harder for the
sake of racing beside her in the next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next race goal is a huge event with new
possibilities—the Yasuda Kinen!
